languages.text: "Конечно, такие привилегии для черни — дело неслыханное. Но эти люди — кровь корабля, Лорд-капитан, сколь бы низко они не стояли в социальной иерархии. Аугментация нижних палуб позволит работникам трудиться дольше, а старожилам — сохранять здравость рассудка и передавать свой опыт новым поколениям. Я рекомендую ответить согласием на прошение — сила вашего экипажа только возрастет!"

"Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"
languages.original_text: "Конечно, такие привилегии для черни — дело неслыханное. Но эти люди — кровь корабля, Лорд-капитан, сколь бы низко они не стояли в социальной иерархии. Аугментация нижних палуб позволит работникам трудиться дольше, а старожилам — сохранять здравость рассудка и передавать свой опыт новым поколениям. Я рекомендую ответить согласием на прошение — сила вашего экипажа только возрастет!"

Allowing augmentation among the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer, and it will help older crew members to remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to new generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"

languages.text: 「この人たちは船の命脈です、船長様。社会階層の低い人であっても。下甲板での強化を許せば、労働者はより長く働くことができ、年配の船員は健全な精神を保ち、経験を新世代に伝えることができます。この要求を許可することをお勧めします。船員はより強くなるでしょう！」
languages.original_text: "These people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation among the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer, and it will help older crew members to remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to new generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"

traits.locale_text: 「この人たちは船の命脈です、船長様。社会階層の低い人であっても。下甲板での強化を許せば、労働者はより長く働くことができ、年配の船員は健全な精神を保ち、経験を新世代に伝えることができます。この要求を許可することをお勧めします。船員はより強くなるでしょう！」

languages.text: "Elbette, alt güverteler için bu tür ayrıcalıklar daha önce görülmemiş bir şey. Ancak bu insanlar, sosyal hiyerarşideki konumları ne kadar düşük olursa olsun geminin can damarıdır Lord Kaptan. Alt güvertelerde ogmentasyona izin vermek, işçilerin daha uzun süre çalışmasını sağlayacak ve yaşlı mürettebatın akıl sağlığını korumasına, deneyimlerini genç nesillere aktarmasına yardımcı olacaktır. İsteği kabul etmenizi tavsiye ederim. Bu, mürettebatınızı güçlendirecektir!"
languages.original_text: "Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"

traits.locale_text: "Elbette, alt güverteler için bu tür ayrıcalıklar daha önce görülmemiş bir şey. Ancak bu insanlar, sosyal hiyerarşideki konumları ne kadar düşük olursa olsun geminin can damarıdır Lord Kaptan. Alt güvertelerde ogmentasyona izin vermek, işçilerin daha uzun süre çalışmasını sağlayacak ve yaşlı mürettebatın akıl sağlığını korumasına, deneyimlerini genç nesillere aktarmasına yardımcı olacaktır. İsteği kabul etmenizi tavsiye ederim. Bu, mürettebatınızı güçlendirecektir!"

languages.text: «Naturalmente, otorgar estos privilegios a las cubiertas inferiores es un acto sin precedentes. Sin embargo, esta gente es el corazón de la nave, Lord Capitán, por baja que sea su posición en la jerarquía social. Conceder aumentos a los habitantes de las cubiertas inferiores aumentará sus años de servicio útil, y también ayudará a los tripulantes de mayor edad a conservar un buen estado mental y transmitir su experiencia a las generaciones más jóvenes. Recomiendo que acceda a esta petición. ¡No hará más que reforzar a su tripulación!».
languages.original_text: "Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"

traits.locale_text: «Naturalmente, otorgar estos privilegios a las cubiertas inferiores es un acto sin precedentes. Sin embargo, esta gente es el corazón de la nave, Lord Capitán, por baja que sea su posición en la jerarquía social. Conceder aumentos a los habitantes de las cubiertas inferiores aumentará sus años de servicio útil, y también ayudará a los tripulantes de mayor edad a conservar un buen estado mental y transmitir su experiencia a las generaciones más jóvenes. Recomiendo que acceda a esta petición. ¡No hará más que reforzar a su tripulación!».

languages.text: “给下层甲板这等待遇，自然是史无前例。可无论他们的阶层有多低，这些人都是这艘舰船的命脉所在，舰长大人。允许下层甲板进行植入物改造，不仅能延长工人的劳作年限，还能帮助年长的船员保持心智健全，将经验传授给年轻一代。我建议您批准这项请求——这只会增强您船员的整体实力！”
languages.original_text: "Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"

traits.locale_text: “给下层甲板这等待遇，自然是史无前例。可无论他们的阶层有多低，这些人都是这艘舰船的命脉所在，舰长大人。允许下层甲板进行植入物改造，不仅能延长工人的劳作年限，还能帮助年长的船员保持心智健全，将经验传授给年轻一代。我建议您批准这项请求——这只会增强您船员的整体实力！”

languages.text: « Bien entendu, jamais encore de tels privilèges n'ont été octroyés aux ponts inférieurs. Mais ces gens sont les forces vives du vaisseau, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, même s'ils occupent les échelons les plus bas de la hiérarchie sociale. Des augmentations permettraient aux travailleurs de servir plus longtemps et aideraient les plus âgés à rester en pleine possession de leurs moyens pour transmettre leur expérience aux nouvelles générations. Je vous conseille d'accéder à cette demande, ce qui ne fera que renforcer votre équipage ! »
languages.original_text: "Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"

traits.locale_text: « Bien entendu, jamais encore de tels privilèges n'ont été octroyés aux ponts inférieurs. Mais ces gens sont les forces vives du vaisseau, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, même s'ils occupent les échelons les plus bas de la hiérarchie sociale. Des augmentations permettraient aux travailleurs de servir plus longtemps et aideraient les plus âgés à rester en pleine possession de leurs moyens pour transmettre leur expérience aux nouvelles générations. Je vous conseille d'accéder à cette demande, ce qui ne fera que renforcer votre équipage ! »

languages.text: "Natürlich sind derartige Privilegien für die unteren Decks beispiellos. Allerdings sind diese Leute trotz ihres niederen Standes in der gesellschaftlichen Hierarchie der Lebenssaft des Schiffes, Lord Captain. Die Freigabe von Augmentationen auf den unteren Decks würde längere Arbeitszeiten ermöglichen, und ältere Crewmitglieder blieben bei klarem Verstand und könnten ihre Erfahrung an neue Generationen weitergeben. Ich rate Euch, der Bitte zu entsprechen ... Eure Crew würde dadurch nur gestärkt!"
languages.original_text: "Of course, such privileges for the lower decks are unprecedented. Yet these people are the lifeblood of the ship, Lord Captain, however low their standing in the social hierarchy. Allowing augmentation in the lower decks will enable workers to toil longer and will help older crew members remain of sound mind and pass on their experience to younger generations. I advise you to grant the request — it will only strengthen your crew!"
